title: Bhadrachalam Temple
tagline: Bhadrachalam Temple — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: The Sri Sita Ramachandraswamy Temple is a Hindu Temple dedicated to Rama, a prominent avatar of the god Vishnu.
overview.description: The Sri Sita Ramachandraswamy Temple is a Hindu Temple dedicated to Rama, a prominent avatar of the god Vishnu. It is located on the banks of the Godavari River in the town of Bhadrachalam in east Telangana, India. Often simply referred to as Bhadrachalam or Bhadragiri, Bhadradri, the temple is considered one of the Divya Kshetrams of Godavari and is also revered as Dakshina Ayodhya. The central icon features the four-armed Vaikuntha Rama, the form Vishnu appeared in to answer Bhadra'a prayers.

topPlaces.name: Bhadrachalam
topPlaces.description: Bhadrachalam is a census town in Bhadradri Kothagudem district in the Indian state of Telangana. It is an important Hindu pilgrimage town with the Bhadrachalam Temple of Rama, situated on the banks of Godavari River.

topPlaces.name: Burgampahad
topPlaces.description: Burgampadu is the headquarters of Burgampadu mandal in Bhadradri Kothagudem district of the Indian state of Telangana.

topPlaces.name: Sarapaka
topPlaces.description: Sarapaka is a census town in Bhadradri Kothagudem district in the Indian state of Telangana which is in the national highway 30. It is in Pinapaka assembly constituency and in Mahabubabad Loksabha Constituency.

items.note: Bhadrachalam is a census town in Bhadradri Kothagudem district in the Indian state of Telangana. It is an important Hindu pilgrimage town with the Bhadrachalam Temple of Rama, situated on the banks of Godavari River.
Burgampadu is the headquarters of Burgampadu mandal in Bhadradri Kothagudem district of the Indian state of Telangana.

Sarapaka is a census town in Bhadradri Kothagudem district in the Indian state of Telangana which is in the national highway 30. It is in Pinapaka assembly constituency and in Mahabubabad Loksabha Constituency.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhadrachalam Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhadrachalam Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhadrachalam Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajahmundry Airport (117 km) and the nearest railway station is Vijayawada Junction (131 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhadrachalam Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhadrachalam Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhadrachalam Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Bhadrachalam Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhadrachalam Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhadrachalam, Burgampahad, Sarapaka.
